sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_string String, created_at DateTime64(3));
SELECT id, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull(date_string, 3)) AS year_extracted FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_at) AS month, parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull(date_string, 3) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates WHERE parsed_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, EXTRACT(DAY FROM created_at) AS day, parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull(date_string, 3) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates HAVING day > 15;
CREATE TABLE temp_dates (id UInt32, timestamp_column String);
SELECT d.id, EXTRACT(HOUR FROM parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull(d.timestamp_column, 4)) AS hour_extracted FROM temp_dates d JOIN test_dates t ON d.id = t.id WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM t.created_at) = 7;

SELECT t.id, parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull(t.date_string, 3) AS parsed_date, EXTRACT(SECOND FROM parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull(t.date_string, 3)) AS seconds_extracted FROM test_dates t ORDER BY seconds_extracted DESC;
CREATE TABLE another_temp (value String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY value;

SELECT DISTINCT a.value, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull(a.value, 3)) AS year_extracted FROM another_temp a WHERE parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull(a.value, 3) IS NULL OR EXTRACT(MONTH FROM parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull(a.value, 3)) IN (1, 2) ORDER BY year_extracted;

SELECT t1.id, t1.date_string, EXTRACT(DAY FROM parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull(t1.date_string, 3)) AS parsed_day FROM test_dates t1 JOIN (SELECT id, date_string FROM test_dates WHERE date_string != '') t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
